mapper.select: /* 로그인 히스토리 목록 조회 loginhistory.selectLoginHistoryList */ SELECT A.USER_ID, A.IP_ADDR, A.USER_AGENT, A.RESULT, A.FAIL_RSON, DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATE_DT FROM ${dbId}.TB_AUDIT_LOGIN A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT DESC LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{recordCountPerPage}
